//: Drop this file at `{ui-conf}/copilot.json` (the same ui-conf folder that already serves `ui-overrides.json`). When the file is missing or `enabled` is false, the toolbar button stays hidden and the sidebar never mounts. Actions are intentionally empty in this initial UI scaffolding — populate the array to make the entries appear in the sidebar; no UI rebuild required.

actions.//: Example action — uncomment to render a card in the sidebar.
